description:
Attention

  • This product must not be sold at Amazon, Temu and Walmart.
  • If you choose the pick up delivery method, please contact us first, so we can discuss about the detail. If you don't contact us, you may not have the package. Thank you for your understanding!

Description

  • Bright Green Laser: Engineered with advanced green laser technology, this self-leveling laser lever projects a highly visible cross line for superior indoor clarity. With an accuracy of ±1/8 inch (±3mm) at 33 feet (10m), it ensures precise alignment for tiling, picture hanging, and wall framing.
  • Smart Dual Modes: The self-leveling function automatically adjusts within 4° in 3 seconds for instant alignment. Switch to manual mode for angled projects like stair railings. Pulse mode enhances the working range when used with a laser receiver (not included).
  • Compact, Portable & Durable: Combining a lightweight palm-size design with an ergonomic soft-grip handle, this user-friendly laser level features Thermoplastic Rubber (TPR) housing and an IP54 rating for protection against dust, water splashes, and accidental drops—ideal for demanding workplaces.
  • Multiple Mounting Options: Equipped with a 360 degree magnetic base, the laser level tool securely attaches to metal studs, pipes, or appliances. The 1/4"-20 thread allows compatibility with most tripods (not included), making it ideal for ceiling work, flooring installations, and uneven surfaces.
  • After-Sales Support: Enjoy a one-year warranty and responsive technical support within 24 hours. Our dedicated team of experts is committed to your satisfaction and ready to assist with any questions.
